All skills §chit§r from this area will increase §eRadiation§r to the boss. All players will suffer the effects below depending on the §bpercentage§f of this:

§580%§f: All players §creduce 20% max health §rand §cwither II
§c100%§f: All players §cdie§r instantly, and recover back to §d60%§r.

A §ehyperbaric electric ball§f in the center of the arena.

§b§o<재앙 정령>§f Oh, still confused? Lemme tell you what you have to do....

§7If you are §cDPS§f:
1. Destroy the §eZap spark§f instantly when is summoned.

3. Kill §eLightning Acolyte §fand §eLightning Pixie§f when §eHyper-electro guards§f cast.

§7If you are §aHealer§f:
1. Destroy the §eZap spark§f instantly when is summoned.
2. Keep an eye on your teammates' health when boss cast §eQuick attack§f and §eHyper-electro guards§f.
3. Help your teammates to destroy the §eZap spark§f if they forget or miss.

§7If you are §9Tank§f:
1. Destroy the §eZap spark§f instantly when is summoned.
2. Do your best to suffer boss' attack, because it may hurt your other teammates.
3. Help your teammates to destroy the §eZap spark§f if they forget or miss.

All §3freeze damage that players taken stacks 1 §e"Chilling touch" §ffor 8 seconds. Every new stack refreshes the duration. You gain §dInstant Health I§f when duration ends. The more stacks you get, the slower you are.

boss3.detail:
§b§o<재앙 정령>§f Oh, still confused? Lemme tell you what you have to do....

§7If you are §cDPS§f:
1. Whenever §cAvalanche mirror§f or §6Anchebie§f summons, kill them first then attack the boss.
2. Keep a distance from the boss if your §6Chilling touch§f in a high stacks.
3. Stay away from the obvious area when §6Frost ring§f comes.

§7If you are §aHealer§f:
1. Keep a distance from the boss if your §6Chilling touch§f in a high stacks. 
2. Keep an eye on your teammates when §6Anchebie§f or §6Frost ring §fincoming.

§7If you are §9Tank§f:
1. Keep a distance from the boss if your §6Chilling touch§f in a high stacks.
2. You can block §bIce Shard§f shoot to your teammate if you can do it.
3. §cAvalanche mirror§f summons at the boss' current position, by this so, you can lead the boss §ebehind the shelter§f when §6최고 스킬§f so that you can easily deal it.
boss2.intro1:
§b§o<재앙 정령>§f Ofviðri is a boss who challenges players' ability of skill handling priority, awareness of the battlefield, and quickly target changing. The battlefield can become chaotic and unpredictable some time. Also, every decision players make will have its consequences. Failure to adapt quickly will result in a swift defeat.

§f§lOfviðri:
boss2.des2: §fSummon 4 §eBouncing tempest §fin random places. Gives §dLevitation§f and §dSlow falling§f for a while. §f§nYou can step on the §7§nclouds§f§n around the battlefield directly when you get §d§nSlow falling§f§n. Teleport down to the center when effect ends.
boss2.des2_hard:
§fSummon 4 §eBouncing tempest §fin random places. Gives §dLevitation§f and §dSlow falling§f for a while. §f§nYou can step on the §7§nclouds§f§n around the battlefield directly when you get §d§nSlow falling§f§n. Teleport down to the center when effect ends.
§c§nAfflicts 1 second of "Bouncing confinement"(Luck) to all players, inflicting damage to all players if the victim step on the Bouncing tempest.
boss2.des3: §fDeal §cvast damage §fand §cknockback §fto §cstraight line ahead§f after a short period of charging.
boss2.des4:
§fSetting a §cairflow§f that will §espread the whole battlefield§f somewhere. Dealing §cdeadly damage§f on the §eground§f.

§f§lTips:
§b1º§f Step on the §cBouncing tempest§f to bounce up!
boss2.des5: §fSummon a §eStrom guardian§f on one of the §7clouds§f around the battlefield. Dealing §csmall damage§f every 4 seconds to all players if guardian §eexists§f.
boss2.des5_hard: §fSummon a §eStrom guardian§f on one of the §7clouds§f around the battlefield. Dealing §csmall damage§f every 4 seconds to all players if guardian §eexists§f. §c§nThis damage can be stacked by the count of the guardian and ignore any armor, protection, and resistance effects.
boss2.des6: §fSummon §6Tempest totem§f on the center of the field. Gives 15 seconds of §aStrength III, Haste II, Speed II, Instant health §fto all players if destroyed in §b5 §fseconds. Otherwise, gives §cStrength II, Haste II, Speed II to all enemies.
boss2.des7:
§fKeep blowing players outside in a direction. §dHeal§f players if facing the §a§nsame direction§f of the wind§a(Tailwind)§f, otherwise, §cinflict damage§f per second§c(Headwind)§f. Wind direction will change in a period.

§f§lTips:
§b1º§f Look at §etitle §for §eparticle on the ground!
§b2º§c All skills will cast normally, be careful of some §cdeadly skills§f!
boss2.detail:
§b§o<재앙 정령>§f Oh, still confused? Lemme tell you what you have to do....

§7If you are §cDPS§f:
1. Observe the timing of §eTempest guardian§f and §cL-airflow storm§f to decide when to step on §cBouncing tempest§f.
2. Stay alive is most important in §6최고 스킬§f, especially in the beginning.
3. Killing the boss before §6최고 스킬§f by burst damaging is available.

§7If you are §aHealer§f:
1. Help your teammate to kill §eTempest guardian§f and §6Tempest totem§f so that your §cDPS§f teammates can focus more on attacking the boss.
2. Keep an eye on your teammates when stepping on §cBouncing tempest§f that ignore the mechanic of it on §cHard difficulty§f.

§7If you are §9Tank§f:
1. Help your teammate to kill §eTempest guardian§f and §6Tempest totem§f so that your §cDPS§f teammates can focus more on attacking the boss.
2. Attract the boss to attack you.
boss1.intro1:
§b§o<재앙 정령> §fRemolino is a boss who asks players to follow long-distance attacks and test the ability of positioning. §fBoss uses maelstrom to protect itself and disrupt players, §fif players don't focus on the battlefield constantly, boss may deal vast AoE damage to players.

§f§lRemolino:
boss1.des2:
§fPuts a §ctrap§f next to a random player, the trap sticks around for 20 seconds. After a couple of seconds, the trap can be triggered, §eany allies or players§f who step in it will be §cstuck§f there for 3 seconds. If the trap sticks §eplayers§f, it will §cinflict damage§f per second.

§f§lTips:
§b1º§f Can-triggered traps display the §7gray particle§f.
§b2º§f You can §ebait§f the boss into the trap to easily damage it.
boss1.des2_hard:
§fPuts a §ctrap§f next to §c§nall§f player, the trap §c§nsticks around permanently but 8 traps in maximum§f. After a couple of seconds, the trap can be triggered, §eany allies or players§f who step in it will be §cstuck§f there for 3 seconds. If the trap sticks §eplayers§f, it will §cinflict damage§f per second.
§c§nEnemies who stucks the trap will afflict 15 seconds of "Cage Reverberating", inflict damage to all players when step on the trap next time.

§f§lTips:
§b1º§f Triggered traps will display the §7gray particle§f.
§b2º§f You can §ebait§f the boss into the trap to easily damage it.
boss1.des3: §fThe six pillars on the field unleash §ebeams§f in random places, dealing §cAoE damage§f.
boss1.des4:
§fSummons a §elarge vortex §fputting §7below§f all players every 2.5 seconds after charges a few seconds later. §fInflicting §cdamage§f and §cknocking up§f when player get hit.

§f§lTips:
§b1º§f Don't stop moving when you see the boss §espinning §fand §ejumping!
boss1.des5:
Covers boss itself with the maelstrom, getting an amount of §eshield§f and §cResistance IV§f until the §eshield§f breaks.
Cast §eSwirling move §fafter shield breaks.
boss1.des6: §fBoss §ezips§f random around the field, §cinflicting damage§f to player in its path.
boss1.des6_hard:
§fBoss §ezips§f random around the field, §cinflicting damage§f to player in its path.
§c§nDuring zipping, remove and immune Swirl cage and cage's stuck effects.
boss1.des7:
§fA huge §ewhirlpool§f in the middle of the field, constantly §cpulling§f players in the center.
§fIf players get pulled in, they're gonna get a ton of hurt.

§f§lTips:
§b1º§f Nothing to say, §cdon't stop moving!
boss1.detail:
§b§o<재앙 정령>§f Oh, still confused? Lemme tell you what you have to do....

§7If you are §cDPS§f:
1. Try to use §cSwirl cage§f to maximize your damage.
2. Watch your health.

§7If you are §aHealer§f:
1. Watch your teammates' health when they accidentally hit by any skills.
2. Keep an eye on your teammates when triggered §c"Cage Reverberating" of Swirl cage§f on §cHard difficulty§f.

§7If you are §9Tank§f:
1. Attract the boss to attack you.

nd.sys_78:
All bosses' §cHP §fis based on §esingle-player mode§f wtih §enormal difficulty§f. Playercount and difficulty can decide the final §cHP§f of all bosses§7(multiplied)§f. Here's the list of all conditions:

§f§l◆Difficulty§7(Also decide player regen)§f§l:
§aEasy§f: x50%, §2Natural regen §f+ §dRegeneration I§f.
§eNormal§f: 100%, §dRegeneration III §7[default]§f.
§cHard§f: x125%, §dRegeneration II§f.
§7§oIn easy difficulty, bosses' some deadly skill damage will reduce.
§7§oIn hard difficulty, bosses' have some additional mechanics.

§f§l◆Playercount:
§e1 §fPlayer: x100%.
§e2 §fPlayers: x125%.
§e3 §fPlayers: x160%, +50% attack damage.
§e4 §fPlayers: x205%, +50% attack damage.
§e5 §fPlayers: x260%, +100% attack damage.
§c6+ Players: Map self-destruction. Please reinstall the map.

§7§oe.g. A boss base HP is 2000, in 4 players with Hard difficulty, the final HP will be 2000 x 125% x 205% = 5125.
nd.sys_81:
§f§lDisaster concerto:

§fWhen defeat any bosses of Natural Disaster, you will get §e"Disaster concerto"§7(disc)§f.

Concerto that only give 1 means only 1 person can carry it; whereas give 5 means all player can carry it.

Each concerto has its special ability and is connected with related disasters. Concertos may become a good support when you use it well.
nd.sys_83:
§f§lMonument:

§fYou will get §b2 puzzles§7(glazed_terracotta) §fwhen you defeat the boss of Natural Disaster. §c(Remember: Take all puzzles!)

§fFreely put them on the coarse dirt of the monument§7(painting)§f on the right side. Victory comes when the painting is filled with the puzzles.

§c§lCAUTION: You cannot change your class when you carry any puzzles!

nd.sys_94:
§d§lRaid leader's book:

A multi-function book before or during the bossfight, especially in multiplayer. §fFor example, §5Light pillars§f can be used in marking places, conveniently guide or remember you and your teammate where to go or where to do.

You can also change infomation of the sidebar, for example, display §c[DPS]§f to check who's the §7black sheep, although it is not available of ranged class because mojang didn't calculate damage dealt of projectiles on scoreboard.§f Or display §c[Boss health]§f to get the boss' actual health if you are curious §7(Numbers has to /1000 be the integer health).

§cDue to some unsolved BUG in Minecraft(Fuxx Mojang), Raid Leader's book will clear during the bossfight in singleplayer!

§7§oOnly 1 person can be chosen to be the Raid Leader. The person who join first will be the leader, you can change and check who's the leader below:
